FAQ

Questions?

Can I request a driver with car?

Yes. You can request either a driver for your own car or a driver with car, based on availability.

What is a safe driver service?

A professional driver comes to your location and drives your own car to your destination.

Can I book for hourly service?

Yes. Hourly driver service can be requested for meetings, errands, events and multiple stops.

Do you offer daily driver service?

Yes. Daily driver service can be requested for personal, family or office schedules.

How do I report a complaint?

Use the complaint button and submit your name, trip details and complaint.

Need a driver?

Book your driver easily.

Choose a service above and send your pickup details. Driver-only and driver-with-car requests are available based on availability.

Independent private driver service in the UAE.
